sections.paragraph:
Original: בּלל

Transliteration: bâlal

Phonetic: baw-lal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to mix, mingle, confuse, confound
    1. (Qal)
      1. to mingle, confuse
      2. to mix
      3. to give provender, feed (animals)
    2. (Hithpoel) to mix oneself (among others)
    3. (Hiphil) to fade away

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 248

Part(s) of speech: Verb
